identity.name: F1 Intelligence
identity.description: A premium, dark-mode analytics platform that feels like the strategist's console. It balances raw telemetry density with broadcast-quality visuals.
principles: Data is Art: Numbers are the hero, treat them with typographic respect (Monospace).
Velocity in Static: Use italics and slanted shapes to imply speed even when still.
Depth over Flatness: Use Z-axis layering (shadows + borders) to separate data layers.
Precision: 1px borders, exact alignments, no blurry gradients.

usage_rules: Cards MUST use #121418 with a 1px border of #252932.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid dark colors with noise textures.
Use 'Racing Red' sparingly - only for critical alerts or the primary CTA.
Telemetry Cyan is for active states and selection indicators.

scales.display: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter italic
scales.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500

rules: All numerical data (lap times, positions, points) MUST be in 'JetBrains Mono'.
Headings should be Uppercase to mimic broadcast graphics.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all section titles.
Never center-align long paragraphs. Left-align for readability.

strategies: Mobile First: Stack everything on mobile. Expand to 12-col grid on desktop.
Bento Grid for Overview: Use varying card sizes (1x1, 2x1, 2x2) to create visual rhythm.
Dense Data Tables: Use 'table-fixed' with explicit widths for columns to prevent jumping.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-slate-200 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm px-6 py-3 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm px-6 py-3

cards.default: bg-[#121418] border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-xl shadow-black/50

inputs.default: bg-[#0B0D10] border border-white/20 text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 focus:border-cyan-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-400 transition-all placeholder:text-slate-600

visual_enhancers: Noise Texture: Overlay a fixed noise opacity-5 on the background to kill digital flatness.
Corner Accents: Add 2px distinct colored borders on the top-left or bottom-right of key cards.
Scanlines: Subtle repeating linear gradient on charts to mimic telemetry screens.

abstract_lines.usage: Background for Story Explorer or Stats section

assets.icons: Lucide React (Default). Use 'Activity' for analytics, 'Flag' for races, 'Trophy' for GOAT, 'Users' for Rivalry.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: yarn add @fontsource/barlow-condensed @fontsource/jetbrains-mono @fontsource/inter lucide-react recharts clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion
CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to include the specific colors and fonts defined in this JSON.
THEME: Force 'dark' class on the HTML element. This app does not support light mode.
CHARTS: Use Recharts. Customize the 'Tooltip' to be a dark glass card with 'JetBrains Mono' numbers.
DATA: For the 700k records, assume backend pagination. Frontend must implement 'Skeleton' loading states for all data tables.
ROUTING: Use 'react-router-dom'. Define routes: / (Analytics), /race (Deep Dive), /story (Stories), /rivalry (Rivalry), /goat (GOAT Engine).
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text on the #0B0D10 background passes AA contrast. Use text-slate-400 for secondary text, not darker.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
